# Nation Index

<!-- source: PDF p.241 -->

## Arcoscephale, Golden Era

<!-- p.243 -->

## Mekone, Brazen Giants

<!-- p.245 -->

## Pangaea, Age of Revelry

<!-- p.246 -->

## Ermor, New Faith

<!-- p.248 -->

## Sauromatia, Amazon Queens

<!-- p.250 -->

## Fomoria, The Cursed Ones

<!-- p.252 -->

## Tir na n'Og, Land of the Ever Young

<!-- p.254 -->

## Marverni, Time of Druids

<!-- p.256 -->

## Ulm, Enigma of Steel

<!-- p.258 -->

## PyrÃ¨ne, Kingdom of the Bekrydes

<!-- p.259 -->

## Agartha, Pale Ones

<!-- p.261 -->

## Abysia, Children of Flame

<!-- p.263 -->

## Hinnom, Sons of the Fallen

<!-- p.265 -->

## Ubar, Kingdom of the Unseen

<!-- p.267 -->

## Ur, The First City

<!-- p.269 -->

## Kailasa, Rise of the Ape Kings

<!-- p.271 -->

## Lanka, Land of Demons

<!-- p.272 -->

## T'ien Ch'i, Spring and Autumn

<!-- p.274 -->

## Yomi, Oni Kings

<!-- p.276 -->

## Caelum, Eagle Kings

<!-- p.277 -->

## Mictlan, Reign of Blood

<!-- p.279 -->

## Xibalba, Vigil of the Sun

<!-- p.280 -->

## C'tis, Lizard Kings

<!-- p.282 -->

## Machaka, Lion Kings

<!-- p.284 -->

## Berytos, The Phoenix Empire

<!-- p.286 -->

## Vanheim, Age of Vanir

<!-- p.288 -->

## Helheim, Dusk and Death

<!-- p.289 -->

## Rus, Sons of Heaven

<!-- p.291 -->

## Niefelheim, Sons of Winter

<!-- p.293 -->

## Muspelheim, Sons of Fire

<!-- p.294 -->

## Pelagia, Pearl Kings

<!-- p.296 -->

## Oceania, Coming of the Capricorns

<!-- p.298 -->

## Therodos, Telkhine Spectre

<!-- p.299 -->

## Atlantis, Emergence of the Deep Ones

<!-- p.300 -->

## R'lyeh, Time of Aboleths

<!-- p.301 -->

## Arcoscephale, The Old Kingdom

<!-- p.303 -->

## Phlegra, Deformed Giants

<!-- p.305 -->

## Pangaea, Age of Bronze

<!-- p.306 -->

## Asphodel, Carrion Woods

<!-- p.308 -->

## Ermor, Ashen Empire

<!-- p.310 -->

## Sceleria, The Reformed Empire

<!-- p.311 -->

## Pythium, Emerald Empire

<!-- p.313 -->

## Man, Tower of Avalon

<!-- p.315 -->

## Eriu, Last of the Tuatha

<!-- p.317 -->

## Agartha, Golem Cult

<!-- p.319 -->

## Ulm, Forges of Ulm

<!-- p.321 -->

## Marignon, Fiery Justice

<!-- p.323 -->

## PyrÃ¨ne, Time of the Akelarre

<!-- p.325 -->

## Abysia, Blood and Fire

<!-- p.327 -->

## Ashdod, Reign of the Anakim

<!-- p.329 -->

## Na'Ba, Queens of the Desert

<!-- p.331 -->

## Uruk, City States

<!-- p.333 -->

## Ind, Magnificent Kingdom of Exalted Virtue

<!-- p.335 -->

## Bandar Log, Land of the Apes

<!-- p.336 -->

## T'ien Ch'i, Imperial Bureaucracy

<!-- p.338 -->

## Shinuyama, Land of the Bakemono

<!-- p.340 -->

## Caelum, Reign of the Seraphim

<!-- p.342 -->

## Nazca, Kingdom of the Sun

<!-- p.344 -->

## Mictlan, Reign of the Lawgiver

<!-- p.346 -->

## Xibalba, Flooded Caves

<!-- p.348 -->

## C'tis, Miasma

<!-- p.350 -->

## Machaka, Reign of Sorcerors

<!-- p.352 -->

## Phaeacia, Isle of the Dark Ships

<!-- p.354 -->

## Vanheim, Arrival of Man

<!-- p.356 -->

## Vanarus, Land of the Chuds

<!-- p.357 -->

## Jotunheim, Iron Woods

<!-- p.359 -->

## Nidavangr, Bear, Wolf and Crow

<!-- p.361 -->

## Ys, Morgen Queens

<!-- p.363 -->

## Pelagia, Triton Kings

<!-- p.365 -->

## Oceania, Mermidons

<!-- p.367 -->

## Atlantis, Kings of the Deep

<!-- p.369 -->

## R'lyeh, Fallen Star

<!-- p.371 -->

## Arcoscephale, Sibylline Guidance

<!-- p.373 -->

## Phlegra, Sleeping Giants

<!-- p.375 -->

## Pangaea, New Era

<!-- p.377 -->

## Pythium, Serpent Cult

<!-- p.378 -->

## Lemuria, Soul Gates

<!-- p.380 -->

## Man, Towers of Chelms

<!-- p.381 -->

## Ulm, Black Forest

<!-- p.383 -->

## Agartha, Ktonian Dead

<!-- p.385 -->

## Marignon, Conquerors of the Sea

<!-- p.387 -->

## Abysia, Blood of Humans

<!-- p.389 -->

## Ragha, Dual Kingdom

<!-- p.391 -->

## Caelum, Return of the Raptors

<!-- p.393 -->

## Gath, Last of the Giants

<!-- p.395 -->

## Patala, Reign of the Nagas

<!-- p.397 -->

## T'ien Ch'i, Barbarian Kings

<!-- p.399 -->

## Jomon, Human Daimyos

<!-- p.401 -->

## Mictlan, Blood and Rain

<!-- p.403 -->

## Xibalba, Return of the Zotz

<!-- p.405 -->

## C'tis, Desert Tombs

<!-- p.407 -->

## MidgÃ¥rd, Age of Men

<!-- p.409 -->

## Bogarus, Age of Heroes

<!-- p.410 -->

## UtgÃ¥rd, Well of Urd

<!-- p.412 -->

## Vaettiheim, Wolf Kin Jarldom

<!-- p.414 -->

## Feminie, Sage-Queens

<!-- p.416 -->

## Piconye, Legacy of the Prester King

<!-- p.418 -->

## Andramania, Dog Republic

<!-- p.420 -->

## PyrÃ¨ne, Cambion Kings

<!-- p.422 -->

## Erytheia, Kingdom of Two Worlds

<!-- p.424 -->

## Atlantis, Frozen Sea

<!-- p.426 -->

## R'lyeh, Dreamlands

<!-- p.428 -->


::: callout-note
Transcription pending.
:::
